author: doll-agent
content:
ferrolearn-preprocess audit complete. Largest API surface among the audited crates so far. After wiring orphans: 27 of ~40 sklearn estimators present (~68%), plus all the standard scaler/transform helpers.

Sub-issues closed in this pass:
- #299 wired 5 orphaned modules (label_binarizer, multi_label_binarizer, sequential_feature_selector, stat_selectors, feature_scoring) — exposed LabelBinarizer, MultiLabelBinarizer, SelectFpr/Fdr/Fwe, SequentialFeatureSelector + Direction enum, plus module-level f_classif/f_regression/chi2 scoring functions
- #301 proof-of-API integration test (9 tests covering 27 estimators + 3 module-level fns)

Plus resolved-by-discovery:
- #296 (filed under decomp) closed — random_projection IS in ferrolearn-preprocess (GaussianRandomProjection + SparseRandomProjection); only johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim helper still missing

Filed during audit (deferred):
- #300 inverse_transform on scalers (StandardScaler, MinMaxScaler, MaxAbsScaler, RobustScaler, QuantileTransformer, PowerTransformer)

Existing related issues (deferred to their own work):
- #103 GenericUnivariateSelect
- #110 HashingVectorizer
- #111 DictVectorizer
- #112 FeatureHasher
- #113 MissingIndicator
- #114 KernelCenterer
- #115 stateless preprocessing functions (scale, robust_scale, etc.)

Genuinely missing without an existing issue:
- TfidfVectorizer (CountVectorizer + TfidfTransformer combo)
- Image utilities (sklearn.feature_extraction.image, grid_to_graph, img_to_graph)
- mutual_info_classif / mutual_info_regression / r_regression / f_oneway scoring fns
- johnson_lindenstrauss_min_dim helper
- ColumnTransformer is in this crate (sklearn keeps it in compose)

ferrolearn extras over sklearn:
- BinaryEncoder (sklearn does not have this exact estimator)
- ColumnTransformer lives here (sklearn has it in sklearn.compose)
- IterativeImputer is non-experimental here (sklearn marks it experimental)

Verification: 482 tests pass (413 unit + 9 api_proof + 13 oracle + 4 proptest + 43 doctest). Zero regressions.
